nodes.name: European Commission
nodes.summary: EU regulatory body that proposed the AI Act in March 2026

nodes.name: Thierry Breton
nodes.summary: EU Commissioner who led the AI Act proposal

nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.summary: AI company required to submit risk assessments under the AI Act

nodes.name: Google DeepMind
nodes.summary: AI research lab affected by EU AI regulations

nodes.name: Meta
nodes.summary: Tech company affected by EU AI regulations, operates social media platforms

nodes.name: Microsoft
nodes.summary: Technology company whose president praised the AI Act framework

nodes.name: Brad Smith
nodes.summary: Microsoft President who called the AI Act 'balanced'

nodes.name: Elon Musk
nodes.summary: CEO who criticized the AI Act as 'innovation-killing bureaucracy' on X

nodes.name: Nvidia
nodes.summary: Chip company whose CEO said regulations would increase demand for compliance tools

nodes.name: Jensen Huang
nodes.summary: Nvidia CEO who sees regulatory compliance as a business opportunity

nodes.name: Goldman Sachs
nodes.summary: Investment bank that predicted 15% market correction for AI ETFs

nodes.name: Mistral
nodes.summary: French AI startup that protested AI Act rules as disproportionate to EU competitors

nodes.name: Reuters
nodes.summary: News agency that published detailed analysis of AI Act regulatory impact

nodes.name: Bloomberg
nodes.summary: Financial media that covered the AI Act announcement

nodes.name: Mark Warner
nodes.summary: US Senator (D-VA) who introduced a companion AI bill

nodes.name: Electronic Frontier Foundation
nodes.summary: Digital rights group that expressed cautious support for AI regulation

nodes.name: TechVault Inc.
nodes.summary: Company that suffered a massive data breach exposing 45 million records

nodes.name: Sarah Chen
nodes.summary: TechVault CEO who apologized at press conference after data breach

nodes.name: CrowdStrike
nodes.summary: Cybersecurity firm hired to investigate the TechVault breach

nodes.name: Federal Trade Commission
nodes.summary: US regulator that opened investigation into TechVault data breach

nodes.name: Pfizer
nodes.summary: Pharmaceutical giant that announced $68B acquisition of Seagen

nodes.name: Seagen
nodes.summary: Biotech startup being acquired by Pfizer for $68 billion

nodes.name: Albert Bourla
nodes.summary: Pfizer CEO who called the Seagen deal 'transformative for oncology'

nodes.name: Roche
nodes.summary: Pharmaceutical competitor that considered counter-bid for Seagen

nodes.name: Doctors Without Borders
nodes.summary: NGO that criticized the Pfizer-Seagen deal over cancer drug pricing concerns

edges.name: WORKS_FOR
edges.fact: Thierry Breton serves as EU Commissioner leading the AI Act proposal

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: European Commission requires OpenAI to submit risk assessments for foundation models

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: European Commission requires Google DeepMind to comply with AI Act

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: European Commission AI Act applies to Meta's AI models

edges.name: SUPPORTS
edges.fact: Brad Smith praised the EU AI Act framework as 'balanced'

edges.name: OPPOSES
edges.fact: Elon Musk criticized the AI Act as 'innovation-killing bureaucracy' on X

edges.name: WORKS_FOR
edges.fact: Brad Smith is the President of Microsoft

edges.name: WORKS_FOR
edges.fact: Jensen Huang is CEO of Nvidia

edges.name: REPORTS_ON
edges.fact: Goldman Sachs published research predicting 15% correction for AI ETFs

edges.name: OPPOSES
edges.fact: Mistral protested that AI Act rules disproportionately affect EU competitors

edges.name: REPORTS_ON
edges.fact: Reuters published detailed analysis of the AI Act regulatory impact

edges.name: REPORTS_ON
edges.fact: Bloomberg published coverage of the AI Act announcement

edges.name: SUPPORTS
edges.fact: EFF expressed cautious support for AI regulation but raised enforcement concerns

edges.name: WORKS_FOR
edges.fact: Sarah Chen is CEO of TechVault Inc.

edges.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edges.fact: CrowdStrike was hired to investigate the TechVault data breach

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: FTC opened investigation into TechVault following the data breach

edges.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edges.fact: Pfizer announced $68 billion acquisition of Seagen for oncology pipeline

edges.name: WORKS_FOR
edges.fact: Albert Bourla is CEO of Pfizer

edges.name: COMPETES_WITH
edges.fact: Roche considered a counter-bid for Seagen against Pfizer

edges.name: OPPOSES
edges.fact: Doctors Without Borders criticized Pfizer-Seagen deal over cancer drug pricing

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: European Commission must approve the Pfizer-Seagen merger

edges.name: REGULATES
edges.fact: FTC must approve the Pfizer-Seagen acquisition
